description: Test whether including 'Supersedes other <verb> tooling' in the description improves or harms adoption

variants.description: Read file contents via a staged viewport with conflict detection. Supports line_start/line_end for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved.
Read file contents via a staged viewport with conflict detection. Supports line_start/line_end for partial reads. No bytes touch disk until explicitly saved. Supersedes other read tooling.
variants.hypothesis: Supersedes claim -- may increase adoption via authoritative framing, or decrease via avoidance
